name: Bobbin
description: Thread bobbins pinched at the waist, turning upright or flat on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(12% 8%, 88% 8%, 88% 28%, 60% 42%, 60% 58%, 88% 72%, 88% 92%, 12% 92%, 12% 72%, 40% 58%, 40% 42%, 12% 28%); clip-path: polygon(12% 8%, 88% 8%, 88% 28%, 60% 42%, 60% 58%, 88% 72%, 88% 92%, 12% 92%, 12% 72%, 40% 58%, 40% 42%, 12% 28%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
